title: Object state / category classification
description: Classifies the state or category of an object crop using SigLIP. Input is a color image (optionally narrowed by a mask); output is the best category plus a ranked top-k list.

prompts.description: Optional candidate categories to score against.

color.description: Color image (full frame or object crop), shape [H, W, 3].

mask.description: Optional mask restricting the region of interest, [H, W].

best_similarity.description: Similarity score of the top-1 category.
